form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 340m at this track behind Go Forward Blaze beaten 3 lengths (20.05). Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 340m at this track behind Go Forward Blaze beaten 3 lengths (20.05). Should be right in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out and ran very wide rounding the home turn.
Shifted out at the start then in the back straight and came together.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (20.27) over 340m at this track. More than capable and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (20.27) over 340m at this track. More than capable and has to be included.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 340m. Has claims on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 340m. Has claims on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began only moderately; Checked off the heels in the home turn.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when third (19.88) at this track, making it two placings on end. Drawn awkwardly. In the mix in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time when third (19.88) at this track, making it two placings on end. Drawn awkwardly. In the mix in this line-up.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by 5.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a brilliant 19.42 for the 340m trip. Harder here but will be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Eye-catching performance to score by 5.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a brilliant 19.42 for the 340m trip. Harder here but will be in this for a long way.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels and lost considerable ground entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth over 431m at this track, beaten 6 lengths (25.53) behind Scootin' Scooby in a Grade 4/5 on April 1. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth over 431m at this track, beaten 6 lengths (25.53) behind Scootin' Scooby in a Grade 4/5 on April 1. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for racing room rounding the turn into the back straight.
Checked entering the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but could manage only second (19.83) at this track over 340m. Should be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but could manage only second (19.83) at this track over 340m. Should be around the mark.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was bumped on the hindquarters and lost some momentum in the back straight.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth on March 16 over 318m at Dubbo behind Raven Fire, beaten 5 lengths (18.84) in a Grade 5. Tested under these conditions.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fourth on March 16 over 318m at Dubbo behind Raven Fire, beaten 5 lengths (18.84) in a Grade 5. Tested under these conditions.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together on the home turn and almost fell.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a eighth (27.11) in a GR 5 at this track and returns after a three-and-a-half months break. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Looks a winning chance fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ended last campaign with a eighth (27.11) in a GR 5 at this track and returns after a three-and-a-half months break. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Looks a winning chance fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room and lost momentum entering the first turn.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 340m at this track behind Sketchy Stories beaten 10 lengths (20.80). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 340m at this track behind Sketchy Stories beaten 10 lengths (20.80). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together at the turn out of the back straight and was forced wide.
